title: Superpower or Superdanger?
description: AI has incredible capabilities, but every power can be used for good or for evil!
rules: For each statement, decide if it's a SUPERPOWER (positive use) or a SUPERDANGER (negative use) of AI.

questions.text: AI can help doctors find diseases earlier
AI can create fake videos of real people
AI can translate languages in real time
AI can be used to cheat at school
AI can help people with disabilities
AI can spread fake news quickly
AI can create new music and art
AI collects personal data without you knowing
